title: AI, Jobs, and Your Career
modules: Jobs Created by the AI Boom
synopsis: Headlines about AI stealing jobs tell only part of the story — this course gives you the full picture, from which roles are genuinely at risk to the new opportunities emerging in an AI-shaped economy. Walk away with practical strategies for navigating your own career.
rationale: A demand score of 6/10 alongside 0.61 similarity to the adjacent but distinct 'What AI Actually Does to Jobs' signals learner appetite for a broader, action-oriented course that bridges economic analysis with personal career planning.
nearest_existing: What AI Actually Does to Jobs
